skill: Linear inequalities in one or two variables
stem: Anika set a goal to bike at least 36 miles every day to train for a long-distance ride. On a certain day, Anika plans to bike at an average speed of 9 miles per hour. What is the minimum number of hours Anika must bike that day to fulfill the goal?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. To cover at least 36 miles at 9 mph, the minimum time is 36 / 9 = 4 hours.

Other choices misinterpret the relationship between distance, speed, and time.
